summary: Executive user AppleTV+ scheduled/live - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN the user is an Executive user
AND there is a AppleTV+ Game scheduled/in-progress

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the AppleTV+ game tile
steps.result:
THEN the feed button displays
AND the user is able to watch the feed
AND a message does not display letting the user know where the game can be watched
